selectedTaskTitle: Source control agent role — structured commits, branch-per-task strategy, and PR creation on parent completion
progressNote: Fixed Windows git commit failure caused by cmd.exe interpreting pipe characters in commit message body: changed processRunner.ts default from shell=true-on-win32 to shell=false.

humanSummary: T40 (Source control agent role — structured commits, branch-per-task strategy, and PR creation on parent completion) stopped with control_plane_reload_required.
